#define T ( call   ) 
Value:
void                                    \
  test_##call##_buf(void)               \
  {                                     \
        static struct buftest info = {  \
                call##_setup,           \
                call##_badbuf,          \
                call##_cleanup,         \
                #call,                  \
        };                              \
        any_badbuf(&info);              \
  }
